description: The unique resonance through which a being expresses their inner state. It is the carrier of tone and word, understood as a sacred extension of one's presence into the world.
rationale: The breathy 'ha' captures the very act of vocalization - breath becoming sound. The round 'o' resonates like a chamber where voice finds its unique timbre, while the intimate 'ni' grounds this resonance in personal presence. Together they create a word that embodies the journey from breath to sound to personal expression.
